JUDGE DONNA HITCHENS, CLERK DIANNE BOFFI, REPORTER PATTY VAN STEENBERGE. ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-15-2004 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFF HERBERT AND MARIE RILEY'S MOTION FOR PREFERENTIAL SETTING PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A)&(D) IS GRANTED. THE 4/20/05 ASBESTOS STATUS CONFERENCE IS CANCELED. THE CASE IS SET FOR TRIAL 10/4/04 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET 9/24/04 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304.
